case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. JACLYN NALUPA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2019 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NALUPA, JACLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$275.00) SERVED OCT-23-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NALUPA, JACLYN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT NALUPA, JACLYN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY WAH MEI LEW COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT JACLYN NALUPA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NALUPA, JACLYN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,125.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
